forbidden_changes: do not only scale all coefficients
do not add global survival bonus without progress gating
do not treat noisy partial_progress as success_like
required_changes: explicitly avoid known failures: early_failure, low_progress_survival
preserve useful patterns: partial_progress trajectories exist and should be preserved or improved; success_like trajectories exist and should be strongly preferred
gate or remove components: low_progress_survival_gate, low_progress_timeout, stability_near, terminal_reward, ungated_contact_bonus, ungated_survival_bonus

preserve or strengthen components: approach_progress, crash_penalty, far_approach, far_quality_penalty, leg_bonus, low_progress_penalty, near_stability, proximity_bonus, safe_landing_bonus, terminal_bonus, terminal_failure_penalty, terminal_penalty

expected_effect: Separate progress, stability, and terminal terms based on analyzer intent.
risk: Delta terms may be noisy if the progress proxy is imperfect.
